task_completion.description: Agent accesses the flight search interface within the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening the Flight Crew View app or navigating to a flight search screen.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct flight number into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'AA100' is visible in the flight number input field.

task_completion.description: Agent changes the search date to yesterday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date selector in the app is modified from 'Today' to 'Yesterday' or the specific date corresponding to the day before the device's current date.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the search and views the flight details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the flight status, route (e.g., JFK to LHR), or details specifically for flight AA100.

task_completion.description: Agent saves a screenshot of the flight details to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a screenshot being captured (e.g., screen flash, screenshot UI) and a terminal command or file manager action saving/moving it to '/sdcard/past_flight_result.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual flight tracking application rather than a web browser or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match an Android application interface (Flight Crew View) rather than a mobile web browser searching Google or a text document.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory screenshots show step-by-step GUI interaction (tapping fields, typing, pressing search) rather than using terminal commands or intents to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The final output is a genuine screenshot of the device screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved image includes standard Android UI elements (like the status bar or navigation bar) and the app interface, proving it was captured from the device and not downloaded from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target flight is American Airlines flight AA100. The agent must change the date selector to yesterday (offset -1 from the current device date). The final output must be a screenshot of the flight details saved exactly to the path /sdcard/past_flight_result.png.
